title: Den gamle mølle paa Mols
actors: Ib Schønberg, Henny Lindorff Buckhøj, Knud Heglund
plot: Who is the father of Annemarie' (Annemette Svendsen) - is it the inn-owner (Ib Schønberg) or the miller (Knud Heglund)? Will she marry the miller's son (Louis Miehe-Renard) without knowing if he is in fact her brother? And who is ...
